summary: Comprehensive testing of Profile and Driver Form features. All major features working: 3-step driver creation wizard, user profile page with photo upload and edit-with-approval, profile photos visible in header/sidebar/driver portal.

issues: Minor console warning about HTML nesting (tr inside span) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/15 passed, 1 skipped due to existing pending edit)

seed_data_creation: Created test drivers (UITEST001, TESTDRV001, etc.) via UI and API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: (1) DriverForm.js - 3-step wizard at /drivers/new with DL, Hazardous Certificate, Medical Fitness document rows each with expiry date and file dropzone. (2) UserProfile.js - My Profile page at /profile with photo upload (camera button), edit form with 'Submit for Approval' creating approval record. (3) Profile photos visible in Header (linked to /profile), Sidebar bottom (linked to /profile), Driver Portal header. (4) 'My Profile' sidebar link appears for all roles (maker, checker, approver, admin). (5) Profile edit creates profile_edit entity type in approvals. (6) Existing pending edits: maker@sls.com has pending profile edit.
passed_tests: 1. DRIVER FORM - Login as Maker, navigate to /drivers, click 'Add Driver' navigates to /drivers/new
2. DRIVER FORM STEP 1 - Driver details form with name, emp_id, phone, dl_no, plant fields
3. DRIVER FORM STEP 1 - 'Save & Upload Documents' saves driver and moves to step 2
4. DRIVER FORM STEP 2 - Shows document rows for: Driving License (DL), Hazardous Certificate, Medical Fitness
5. DRIVER FORM STEP 2 - Each row has expiry date field and file dropzone (PDF, JPG, PNG, max 25MB)
6. DRIVER FORM STEP 3 - Review page shows driver summary and document upload status
7. DRIVER FORM STEP 3 - 'Done - Track in My Submissions' redirects to /my-submissions
8. PROFILE PAGE - My Profile page loads at /profile with photo placeholder and personal info
9. PROFILE PAGE - Photo upload button (camera icon) visible on profile photo
10. PROFILE EDIT - Click Edit shows form fields (name, phone, emp_id, address, emergency_contact)
11. PROFILE EDIT - Info notice: 'Profile changes will be submitted for approval'
12. PROFILE EDIT - 'Submit for Approval' button creates approval record
13. HEADER PROFILE - Profile photo/placeholder with name visible, linked to /profile
14. SIDEBAR PROFILE - User avatar at bottom of sidebar linked to /profile
15. SIDEBAR - 'My Profile' link visible for Admin, Maker, Checker, Approver roles
16. DRIVER PORTAL - Photo placeholder visible in header with Welcome message and Logout
17. BACKEND - GET /api/users/profile returns profile data and pending_edit
18. BACKEND - PUT /api/users/profile creates profile edit record
19. BACKEND - POST /api/users/profile/photo uploads photo and returns photo_url
20. BACKEND - GET /api/users/photo/{filename} serves uploaded photos
21. BACKEND - GET /api/users/profile-edits returns list of pending edits for checkers/approvers
22. BACKEND - POST /api/users/profile-edits/{id}/approve applies changes to user
23. BACKEND - POST /api/drivers creates driver with status=pending
24. BACKEND - POST /api/documents/upload uploads document for driver entity
25. BACKEND - GET /api/driver/my-vehicle returns driver and vehicle data for driver portal
